notes: Multiple established brands selling Turkish kese/hammam mitts on Amazon (Kelebek, Feel Fine, Sed Mountain, EBSEM). Market saturated with imports, no room for US brand to differentiate.
Turkish glass cleaners use stronger chemical formulations not permitted under US EPA/consumer safety regulations. Can't import or replicate legally.
Higher chemical concentrations than allowed in US market. EPA registration required for any disinfectant claims, complex regulatory path.
Saturated category with established brands (Zwipes, E-Cloth, MagicFiber, etc.). Nothing unique about Turkish version.

product_name: Soda + Sirke Reaktif (Baking Soda Volcano Drain Cleaner)
notes: Baking soda + vinegar drain cleaning is already ubiquitous in US (every lifestyle blog, already sold as combo packs). Zero differentiation opportunity.
